name: nibit
title: Nibit
description: Push to and from your Android phone with Nibit, a Raycast-style productivity layer.
author: jfox

commands.name: inbox
commands.title: Inbox
commands.description: Browse recent encrypted pushes from your Nibit devices.

commands.name: send-push
commands.title: Send Push
commands.description: Send encrypted text or a URL to your Nibit devices.

commands.name: send-file
commands.title: Send File
commands.description: Send an encrypted file to your Nibit devices.

commands.name: latest-push
commands.title: Latest Push
commands.description: Open the newest received push with context-aware actions.

commands.name: paste-latest-push
commands.title: Paste Latest Push
commands.description: Paste the newest text push directly.

commands.name: refresh-inbox
commands.title: Refresh Inbox
commands.description: Sync pending encrypted pushes into the local Raycast inbox.

commands.name: sign-out
commands.title: Sign out
commands.description: Sign out of Nibit and clear local Raycast sync state.
